applicationNote: Apply through the myNSFAS portal at www.nsfas.org.za before the national closing date.

additionalFunding.name: UJ Vice-Chancellor's Award
additionalFunding.criteria: Top matric results (90%+); all provinces considered

additionalFunding.name: UJ Sport Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: National, provincial or UJ varsity sport team representation

additionalFunding.name: UJ Equity Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: Students from designated groups with proven financial need
